description_long: This is a sporty blue coupe car with a prominent black hood and a large rear spoiler, giving it a racing-inspired appearance. The body features dynamic white and blue racing stripes that run along the sides and roof, enhancing its aggressive and fast look. The car has a low, aerodynamic profile with a sloped roofline and wide stance, suggesting high performance. The front end is equipped with sleek headlights and a bold grille, while the rear showcases a wide taillight bar and a pronounced diffuser. The wheels are dark-colored, likely alloy, and the windows are tinted, adding to the car's modern and stylish aesthetic. The overall design is reminiscent of high-performance street or track cars commonly seen in urban and motorsport environments.
description: A blue coupe car with a black hood, racing stripes, large rear spoiler, and sporty, aerodynamic styling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black hood, blue fenders, sleek headlights, and wide stance.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the racing stripes, two doors, tinted windows, and large rear spoiler.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wide taillight bar, rear diffuser, and prominent spoiler.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible racing stripes, two doors, and sporty wheels.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
